text: Hybrid QR implemented: scaled normalized Householders, unblocked path below min(m,n)=96, 32-column compact-WY panels above, packed V^T + two GEMM trailing updates, reusable workspace. JVM/JS tests green for tall/wide partial panels, exact rank deficiency, known-solution least squares, extreme scales, reconstruction, orthogonality, and workspace reuse. Directional noisy JDK25 JMH n=256: QR 211.5 vs Breeze 130.6 ops/s (1.62x); Lstsq 35.75 vs 17.22 (2.08x).
